_comment: WebhookConfig fixture for the sequential-approvals demo (wait_for_webhook_sequential_test.json). The workflow has two WAIT_FOR_WEBHOOK tasks, each matching on a different 'level' value. The WebhookConfig routes all events to the workflow; the hash routing inside the task separates manager vs director events. Step 1: POST {"approval": {"purchaseId": "pu-42", "level": "manager", "decision": "approved"}}. Step 2: POST {"approval": {"purchaseId": "pu-42", "level": "director", "decision": "approved"}}.
name: purchase-approval-webhook
